title: Forest Focus
description: Immerse yourself in the calming sounds of a forest with gentle bird chirps and rustling leaves. Perfect for deep work and concentration.

title: Ocean Waves
description: Gentle ocean waves create a peaceful rhythm that soothes the mind and promotes relaxation. Feel the ocean breeze and tranquility.

title: Rainy Night
description: Soft rain pattering on the roof creates the perfect backdrop for deep sleep. Let the natural rhythm carry you to dreamland.

title: Mountain Meditation
description: High altitude serenity with subtle winds and distant echoes. Find your inner peace on the mountain peaks.

title: Urban Reset
description: Gentle city sounds with a mix of coffee shop ambience and minimal traffic. Reset your mind in the heart of the city.

title: Zen Garden
description: Japanese garden ambience with water fountains and meditation bells. Enhance your focus and mindfulness.
